metadata.track_name: 推进 shell runtime facade phase2
metadata.goal: 让 shell/runtime entry 优先消费更窄的 domain runtime facade port，而不是继续直接拼接 AI orchestration internals。

phase.name: Facade Ownership Freeze
phase.goal: 冻结哪些 shell 责任应下沉为更窄 facade port。

task.name: 定义 shell facade ownership 表
task.description: 明确哪些 AI glue 仍留在 shell，哪些应转为 domain facade port。

acceptance_criteria.criterion: shell 不形成第二真相源

phase.name: Facade Cutover
phase.goal: 完成第一轮更窄 facade port cutover。

task.name: 引入并消费更窄的 domain runtime facade
task.description: 让 terminal/tui/headless 入口优先消费新的 domain runtime facade port。

phase.name: Focused Verification
phase.goal: 验证 shell facade 收紧后主路径不回归。

task.name: 运行 shell runtime facade focused tests
task.description: 覆盖 terminal/tui/headless adoption 与 capability-port ownership。
